rationale: Finnhub social-sentiment API fits refresh_watchlists.sh (single FINNHUB_API_KEY, no Reddit Responsible Builder or X pay-per-use). social-stock-sentiment PyPI not required for v1.

finnhub.note: Spike run without FINNHUB_API_KEY; add key and re-run fi_sentiment_spike.py

social-stock-sentiment.note: Package not installed; optional compare only
